div1.entryFree: Ruinate, vb. to ruin, to bring to decay, to demolish: to r. proud buildings with thy hours, Lucr. 944. seeking that beauteous roof to r. which to repair should be thy chief desire, Sonn. 10, 7. I will not r. my father's house, H6C V, 1, 83. to order well the state, that like events may ne'er it r. Tit. V, 3, 204. Partic. r.: Err. III, 2, 4; M. Edd. for the sake of the rhyme ruinous.
